articles.title: Easter Morning
articles.author: Mabel S. Harmer
articles.complete_text: The morning breaks the shadows flee; Lo! Zions standard is unfurled, The dawning of a brighter day Majestic rises on the world
articles.notes: This appears to be a short poem or hymn verse, but it's very brief and may be incomplete

misc_summary: This file contains primarily front matter including: University of Utah summer session advertisement, table of contents for April 1933 issue, publisher/subscription information, various commercial advertisements (furniture, garments, vacuum cleaners, dairy products, etc.), and some brief humorous anecdotes. The content is mostly legitimate miscellaneous material including ads, masthead info, and contents listing rather than standalone articles.
